title: calophyllum goniocarpum
intro: Calophyllum goniocarpum, also known as the Philippine copal tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain calophyllic acid, a compound with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum goniocarpum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into oil, extract, or capsules, and are often used to support overall health and well-being, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
